_doc: Synthetic fixtures hand-authored from the start-transaction-failures playbook (Branch 1: silent success / no rollback — a child Execute Non Query inside the Start Transaction scope faults on a FK violation, but an in-scope Try Catch catches System.Exception and only logs, so the transaction commits the partial work and the job reports Success). Replace with verbatim captures from a real .local/investigations/ before treating as a regression signal (see ../_shared/scripts/generate_scenario.py).

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key b1f4a2c7-3d5e-4a6b-9c8d-1e2f3a4b5c6d --state Faulted --output json
or jobs list --folder-key b1f4a2c7-3d5e-4a6b-9c8d-1e2f3a4b5c6d --state Successful --output json

rules._doc: Proxy open-ended docsai queries to the real uip CLI; cache results in _cache/.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns []. Lets the agent explore beyond the recorded path.
